{{CargoRelic
|name=1900's Vinyl Record
|class_id=22075
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=10-29
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Oct 29, 1921 AD, an unknown pianist recorded his feelings for a girl in this record.<br>This vinyl record is the only recorded work of an unknown pianist born and living on a ship. After defeating a famous pianist in a piano duel, he was invited by a company to make a recording. But because this piece of music was composed when he fell in love with a girl, he changed his mind and planned to dedicate this record to her. It's a pity that being shy by nature, he failed to gift this record to her at the end, and he destroyed this record. His friend hid the fragment of the record inside his piano. Decades later, an old shopkeeper found it and successfully restored the record, and that was how this wonderful legend came to be known.
|fame=30
|art=32
|fth=26
|civ=45
|tech=21
|ss1=Per 100k Civil Points gained, Snail RUSH +1<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss2=Per 100k Civil Points gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss3=Per 100k Civil Points gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss4=Per 100k Civil Points gained, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss7=Per 100k Civil Points gained, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000<br>Snail RUSH +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, INTEL gained +2.5%
}}
